body_txt: In fiction, children have a habit of hiding on ships, airplanes, spaceships, etc., whenever they decide to go on an adventure . When they are discovered, the adults are frequently unable to leave them behind, usually because of sympathy and/or because it would be too expensive, difficult, or time-consuming to return them. Many such stowaways may even be counting on this. Compare Cargo Concealment Caper , when people hide within cargo to enter or escape an area. Also compare Squirrels in My Pants if the stowaway is being concealed/transported inside of another characters clothing.
